title: aglaomorpha mollis
intro: Aglaomorpha mollis, also known as the Soft Shield Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Aglaomorpha mollis include its ability to reduce fever, soothe skin irritations, and support immune function. Aglaomorpha mollis can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves can also be used as a poultice or added to salves to promote wound healing.
